name: Rememberizer MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server from SkyDeck AI for Rememberizer — their AI memory and knowledge management service. Enables AI agents to store, retrieve, and search personal and team knowledge through Rememberizer's semantic memory system. Provides persistent AI memory across sessions by storing important information in Rememberizer's cloud knowledge base.
use_cases: Persisting AI agent knowledge and decisions across sessions via Rememberizer
Semantic search over stored knowledge from AI assistant agents
Building team knowledge bases that AI agents can query and update
Implementing AI memory for personalized assistant experiences
not_for: Offline or air-gapped environments (Rememberizer is a cloud service)
Teams with strict data sovereignty requirements (cloud memory storage)
Simple session-level context that doesn't need persistence
best_when: A developer or team wants AI agents to have persistent memory — storing decisions, preferences, and knowledge that persists across conversations through Rememberizer's managed service.
avoid_when: Your AI assistant already has sufficient context management, or you need on-premises memory storage. Cloud-stored AI memory has data residency implications.

auth.notes: Rememberizer API key required. Register at rememberizer.ai for access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier with storage and query limits
pricing.paid_tiers: Paid plans for higher storage and query volume
pricing.notes: Rememberizer has a free tier. MCP server is free open source from skydeckai.

known_agent_gotchas: Stored memories are cloud-hosted — consider what information is appropriate to persist externally
Memory retrieval quality depends on semantic search — verify relevant facts are retrieved
Memory conflicts can emerge if agents store contradictory information — design update patterns
skydeckai/Rememberizer is an emerging service — evaluate production maturity
agent_readiness.security_notes: Memories stored in Rememberizer cloud (US data residency). Information stored may include sensitive context — review what agents persist. API key authentication. HTTPS enforced.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cloud memory storage. US data residency. Review what context agents store — can include sensitive information.
